<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const code = params.get('code');
    let uri  = params.get('uri');

    // update heading
    const h = document.querySelector('.error-heading');
    if (code && h) {
      h.textContent = `Internal Server Error - ${code}`;
    }

    // update the URI paragraph
    const u = document.querySelector('.error-uri-value');
    if (uri && u) {
      // prepend full domain
      uri = 'https://qnpturbines.com' + decodeURIComponent(uri);
      u.textContent = uri;
    }

    // set current UTC time
    const t = document.getElementById('utc-time');
    if (t) {
      t.textContent = new Date().toUTCString();
    }
  });
</script>

<!-- hCaptcha loader -->
<script>
(function () {
  if (!window.hcaptchaScriptLoading) {
    window.hcaptchaScriptLoading = true;

    setTimeout(function () {
      const script = document.createElement('script');
      script.src = 'https://js.hcaptcha.com/1/api.js?onload=hCaptchaInit';
      script.async = true;
      script.defer = true;
      document.head.appendChild(script);
    }, 10000); // 10,000 ms = 10 seconds
  }
})();
</script>

<!-- Form logic -->
<script>
(function () {
  let formData = null;
  let formSubmitted = false;
  let form = null;
  let overlay = null;

  const cancelBtn = document.getElementById('cancelCaptchaBtn');
  if (cancelBtn && !cancelBtn._listenerAdded) {
    cancelBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      overlay.style.display = 'none';
      form.querySelectorAll('input, button, textarea, select').forEach(el => el.disabled = false);
    });
    cancelBtn._listenerAdded = true; // Prevent double-binding
  }

  // Only define global callbacks once
  if (!window.onCaptchaSuccess) {
    window.onCaptchaSuccess = function (token) {
      if (!formData || !form) return;
      formData.append('h-captcha-response', token);

      fetch(form.action, {
        method: 'POST',
        body: formData
      }).then(() => {
        formSubmitted = true;
        overlay.style.display = 'none';
        alert("Message submitted successfully! Our team will reply to you as soon as possible.");
        form.reset();
        form.querySelectorAll('input, button, textarea, select').forEach(el => el.disabled = false);
      }).catch(() => {
        overlay.style.display = 'none';
        alert("Error submitting form");
        form.querySelectorAll('input, button, textarea, select').forEach(el => el.disabled = false);
      });
    };
  }

  if (!window.onCaptchaExpired) {
    window.onCaptchaExpired = function () {
      if (!formSubmitted && overlay) {
        overlay.style.display = 'none';
        alert("Captcha expired. Please try again.");
        form.querySelectorAll('input, button, textarea, select').forEach(el => el.disabled = false);
      }
    };
  }

  if (!window.onCaptchaError) {
    window.onCaptchaError = function () {
      if (!formSubmitted && overlay) {
        overlay.style.display = 'none';
        alert("Captcha error. Please try again.");
        form.querySelectorAll('input, button, textarea, select').forEach(el => el.disabled = false);
      }
    };
  }

  // Define this so it only runs when the script loads the first time
  window.hCaptchaInit = function () {
    setupFormLogic();
  };

  // Safe re-init for SPAs
  function setupFormLogic() {
    form = document.getElementById('contact-form');
    overlay = document.getElementById('captchaOverlay');

    if (!form || !overlay) return;

    if (form._hcaptchaAlreadyHooked) return;
    form._hcaptchaAlreadyHooked = true;

    form.addEventListener('submit', function (e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      formSubmitted = false;
      formData = new FormData(form);
      form.querySelectorAll('input, button, textarea, select').forEach(el => el.disabled = true);
      overlay.style.display = 'flex';
    });
  }

  // In case the hCaptcha script was already loaded before this script runs
  if (window.hcaptcha && typeof window.hCaptchaInit === 'function') {
    window.hCaptchaInit();
  }
})();
</script>

  (function() {
    const container = document.querySelector('.chart-counter');
    const label = container.querySelector('.progress-text');
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
      const prog = (window.innerHeight - rect.top) / (window.innerHeight + rect.height);
      const pct = Math.min(Math.max(prog, 0), 1) * 100;
      if (label) label.innerText = Math.round(pct) + ' days';
    });
  })();
</script>

<!-- append this anywhere in your page (e.g. inside <head> or before the closing </body>) -->
<style>
  .slider {
    overflow: hidden;
    width: 100%;
  }
  .slides {
    display: flex;
    /* duration override via script */
    animation: slideShow 12s infinite;
  }
  .slide {
    flex: 0 0 100%;
  }
  .slide img {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: auto !important;
    display: block;
  }
  /* the @keyframes will be injected by the script below */
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slider .slide');
  const u = slides.length;
  if (u < 2) return; // nothing to animate

  // override the animation duration to (8 * u) seconds
  const slidesContainer = document.querySelector('.slider .slides');
  slidesContainer.style.animation = `slideShow ${8 * u}s infinite`;

  const n = (u - 1) * 4;
  const time = 100 / n;
  const pct = v => Number(v.toFixed(4));

  let frames = [];

  // first slide (i=0): 0 → 2*time
  frames.push(`
    0%               { transform: translateX(0%); }
    ${pct(2 * time)}% { transform: translateX(0%); }
  `);

  // middle slides (i=1 … u-2)
  for (let i = 1; i < u - 1; i++) {
    const start = 3 * time + (i - 1) * 4 * time;
    const end   = 6 * time + (i - 1) * 4 * time;
    const shift = -100 * i;
    frames.push(`
      ${pct(start)}% { transform: translateX(${shift}%); }
      ${pct(end)}%   { transform: translateX(${shift}%); }
    `);
  }

  // last slide (i=u-1): (n-1)*time → 100%
  const lastShift = -100 * (u - 1);
  frames.push(`
    ${pct(time * (n - 1))}% { transform: translateX(${lastShift}%); }
    100%                     { transform: translateX(${lastShift}%); }
  `);

  const style = document.createElement('style');
  style.textContent = `@keyframes slideShow {${frames.join('')}}`;
  document.head.appendChild(style);
});
</script>

​On March 3rd, 2025, a heavy snowfall brought us a beautiful sight of everything covered in white. However, this became an​ ​immediate inconvenience to the company's factory area. In order to ensure employee safety in traveling and normal production​ ​activities, we quickly organized all employees to carry out a vigorous snow-clearing operation.​

​The roaring of our steam turbine symbolizes the heartbeat of a powerful industrial nation, while the busy figures clearing the snow​ ​convey the warmth of responsibility. This snow-clearing initiative not only showcases the united, cooperative, and positive spirit of​ ​employees from all departments of QNP Steam Turbines but also vividly demonstrates the company's profound concern for​ ​employees' safety. Looking ahead, we will consistently uphold this spirit, proactively tackle various challenges, and work tirelessly​ ​for the growth of the enterprise and the well-being of our team.​

Early this morning, our company's leaders led teams of employees from various departments to pick up tools such as shovels and​ ​brooms to start the snow-clearing process. Everyone had a crucial position and cooperated tacitly. Some employees were​ ​responsible for removing the thick snow on the main roads, while others focused on clearing the remaining snow on the sidewalks​ ​and ladders. Additionally, many took the initiative to clean the green belts along the roads within the factory area; this ensured our​ ​green plants would not be crushed by the snow. Over an hour of hard work, the main roads in the company's factory area were​ ​cleared, opening up a safe passage for employee travel and vehicle passage.​

It is a comprehensive manufacturing enterprise integrating scientific research, design, manufacturing, installation, service and EPC projects. The market covers both at home and abroad, and the business scope ranges from single machine to complete set.

QNP has won more than 60 honorary titles such as "Shandong Enterprise Technology Center", "Shandong High-speed and High-efficiency Steam Turbine Engineering Technology Research Center" and "Metrology Confirmation Guarantee Qualified Enterprise" and has passed the CE, ISO9001, ISO14001, ISO45001 certification of EU.

QNP steam turbine uses optimized high-efficiency blade profile, meridian plane profile and clearance of each stage to improve the steam path structure, and uses optimized seal and high speed to improve the energy conversion rate. Advanced DEH system, TSI system and ETS system are used to monitor and protect the operation process.
QNP generator optimizes electromagnetic field, air path and rotor structure, which makes the generator more efficient, simple to maintain and longer in service life.

The product selection and technical scheme calculation of QNP compressor can be carried out according to customer's needs, and the best solution is provided to customers. Compared with other similar products, the efficiency is improved by 5%, and the benefits are maximized for users.
QNP products adopt modularized design, which has the advantages of high efficiency, small dimension and light weight.

QNP has a skilled, experienced and excellent after-sales service team, which can quickly respond to customer needs and provide users with fast and high-quality services at any time. Follow-up service is be carried out to the whole process of installation and commissioning for all projects to improve customer satisfaction. QNP has offices all over the world to quickly contact and serve customers.

Based on the strong technical strength, QNP can make maintenance plan and implement one-to-one service according to users' needs, so as to make customers' operation more secure, worry-free and professional.

We provide full overhaul to improve the efficiency, durability and reliability of the following systems:
Overhaul and test of electrical system

The safe operation of electrical equipment of steam turbine generator set is related to the safety of electricity consumption. The preventive test regulations of power equipment clearly put forward the test contents and cycles of various power equipment to avoid the occurrence of power faults to the greatest extent. Generator is the "heart" of power system, and its safe operation will directly affect the stability of power system and the quality of electric energy. The mechanical structure of the generator itself is complex, and there are huge auxiliary equipment, which makes the condition that the failure of any component of the generator system may lead to the whole system stopping operation. As a designer and manufacturer of generator and electrical cabinet, QNP has rich experience to deal with various electrical failures, and can undertake a variety of test projects.

QNP has introduced and mastered advanced and mature aerothermal design technology from abroad for steam path expansion, efficiency improvement, renovation and upgrading to raise the old steam turbine efficiency, reduce operation cost and increase economic efficiency.
The main contents are as follows:

1) Steam turbine expansion and transformation: By optimizing the design of steam inlet passage of steam turbine flow path, the area of flow path is increased, and the capacity of steam inlet and exhaust of the unit is improved, so as to enhance the functional capacity of the unit and increase the economic benefit.

2) Generator expansion and transformation. The capacity of the generator can be improved by reducing the internal losses of the generator, increasing the heat-resistant grade of the insulating materials and strengthening the ventilation and cooling without changing the volume, speed and voltage grade of the generator.

QNP has provided the transformation service for many power plants to change the extraction condensing unit into extraction back pressure unit, having accumulated rich transformation experience. QNP can do deep transformation of various types of small and medium-sized steam turbine units, so as to improve the steam supply capacity of existing units and the thermal efficiency of power plants, and obtain the best transformation effect with minimum changes.
Upgrading of Vacuum System of Steam Turbine.

Three-dimensional design and transformation of condenser is carried out to reduce the difference of heat transfer end, improve the vacuum degree of exhaust steam and effectively improve the economy of unit. The unit is transformed from water cooling to air cooling.
Upgrading of steam turbine speed control system.

The previous pure hydraulic control system of the old unit is transformed with digital electro-hydraulic control system, which can upgrade the steam turbine control system and meet the requirements of flexible configuration of various control strategies.
